title: paspalum crinitum
intro: Paspalum crinitum, also known as long-haired paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum crinitum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Paspalum crinitum is often used as a decoction or infusion, where the dried plant material is steeped in hot water to make a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
